Today's Digital Daily

Today's Digital Daily

The Oscar-winning actress has been a global ambassador for Omega since 2005.

Senior Digital News Writer

Nicole Kidmanwas the guest of honor at the red carpet event for “Her Time” withOmegaon Monday in Paris. TheOscar-winning actresswas joined by her daughter Sunday Rose for the evening, which honored the Swiss luxury watchmaker’s commitment to women’s timepieces and its rich history of more than 100 years.

For the occasion, Kidman fashioned a cropped blouse and high-waisted, flared skirt that perfectly coordinated in a crisp white monochrome look. The “Big Little Lies” Emmy winner also wore a pair of Charles & Keith pointed-toe heels and added an Omega watch as the finishing touch of her ensemble.Related ArticlesCelebrity NewsMiley Cyrus Brings Demna's Gucci Vision to 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' Premiere in Los AngelesCelebrity NewsTeyana Taylor Gets Fiery in Chanel With High-contrast Tones for the 2025 Gotham Awards

Kidman’s 16-year-old daughter, who she shares with husband Keith Urban,styled the vest trendthat’s made a resurgence on the red carpet as of late. Sunday Rose wore a gray vest along with a pair of low-rise, wide-leg trousers for her look. The teenager previously joined her mother in coordinated all-black attire at theBalenciaga fall 2024 couture showduring Paris Fashion Week last June.You May Also Like

Omega’s event coincided with the 2024 Olympics and Paralympics. “Timing the Olympic and Paralympic Games is a task that requires great quality and attention to detail. I’m proud that we’re able to reflect that same value in our women’s watchmaking and make a celebration of it here in Paris — the city of fashion,” Raynald Aeschlimann, Omega’s president and chief executive officer, said in a statement.

“I’m also delighted to share the moment with Nicole, who always styles our timepieces in such a captivating way.”

Kidman joined Omega as a brand ambassador in 2005 and has been a longtime supporter of the Swiss luxury brand ever since. “I’ve always loved working with Omega because of the versatility of the brand,” she said in a statement.

“Whether it’s women’s watchmaking, the Olympic Games, or James Bond. It’s a joy to be here in Paris, to experience the sport, and be with the brand on such a wonderful occasion.”

In April, the Omega brand held a celebration in Los Angeles honoring Kidman’sAFI Lifetime Achievement Award. Speaking to WWD, Omega CEO and president Raynald Aeschlimann reflected on their longstanding relationship. “When we look for ambassadors, we look for people that are not just around one day, one year or two years — the biggest of the biggest people that have a lot of character, determination and devotion to their profession and bring a lot to us,” he said. “Because of this continuity in our values, it’s quite rare to find people like her or like George Clooney, who have been so many years doing their job in an excellent way.…And that’s why we like being connected to some people like that because they are our heroes.”

Over the course of the last few years, Kidman has helmed events for Omega, including their “One Night in Nashville” 2022 event. Kidman has also been the star of several Omega watch campaigns in the past.

title: Nicole Kidman Wows in Valentino with Daughter Sunday Rose for Omega
author: Julia Teti
description: Nicole Kidman fashioned a Valentino crop top and skirt set alongside her daughter with Keith Urban Sunday Rose at the 'Her Time' Omega event in Paris.
